disclosures.detail: stock.sum (sum) coarsens across blocked lineage 'calendar' (edge day->cal.month); per-bucket totals do not reconcile along this axis

exemplars.caption: The ambiguous ask

disclosures.detail: inline reduction 'mean(aov)' does not pin its input anchor — the grain to resolve 'aov' at before reducing to cal.year is underdetermined; pin it, e.g. 'mean(aov@cal.month)'

menu: pin the input anchor to 'cal.month' (e.g. mean(aov@cal.month))
pin the input anchor to 'cal.quarter' (e.g. mean(aov@cal.quarter))
pin the input anchor to 'day' (e.g. mean(aov@day))

exemplars.caption: The question with its reason attached

disclosures.detail: revenue @ category: relating crosses a non-functional (M:N) edge product↔category (a product belongs to up to 3 categories); this aggregate-across is underdetermined — the measure would be replicated across matches and the total inflated

menu: category.touch — revenue reaches every category a product sits in — deliberately multi-counted; totals exceed the grand total

exemplars.caption: A true refuse (the wheel needs one)

disclosures.detail: stock @ customer: 'customer' is not addressable in universe 'inventory' (out of domain — undefined, not missing)
stock.sum (sum) coarsens across blocked lineage 'calendar' (edge day->cal.month); per-bucket totals do not reconcile along this axis

exemplars.caption: Revenue by category, answered lawfully (the overlap stated)

disclosures.detail: multi-counted by construction across product<->category: revenue reaches every category a product sits in — deliberately multi-counted; totals exceed the grand total
coverage 600/600: every product carrying revenue is categorized (no shortfall; the over-count is the only skew)
